text: You are deeply loved.
Your presence makes the world brighter.
Every day with you is a gift.
Your kindness changes lives.
You deserve happiness today.
You are stronger than you think.
Your smile lights up every room.
You are worthy of every beautiful thing.
You inspire people around you.
You bring warmth wherever you go.
You are someone's reason to smile.
Your heart is full of love.
You deserve peace and joy.
You make the world better just by being here.
You are appreciated more than you know.
Your compassion is powerful.
You radiate positivity.
You are capable of amazing things.
You matter.
Your love leaves a mark on the world.
